_comment: Prompt manifest for ElevenLabs Sound Effects generation. Run scripts/sfx/generate.mjs. Files land in packages/client/public/sfx as .mp3 + .webm, loudness-normalized to ~-16 LUFS. Prompts are in English (the SFX model works best in English).

signals._comment: Decoder base signals: the 'true' transmission heard as the player decodes. 10 variants per rarity, 15s seamless loops. Files: signal-<rarity>-<1..10>.

rarities.common: Deep space cosmic background radiation, faint microwave hiss, a calm distant low rumble of the void, steady and featureless, no melody, no rhythm, gentle radio-telescope ambience, seamless loop
rarities.uncommon: A radio pulsar: steady rhythmic radio pulses like a cosmic lighthouse beacon, regular metronome-like blips with a short reverb tail, clean sci-fi radio-telescope signal over faint static, seamless loop
rarities.rare: Magnetospheric chorus 'dawn chorus': eerie whistling tones gliding upward in pitch, ghostly electromagnetic whistlers and chirps sweeping over each other, ethereal and otherworldly, seamless loop
rarities.epic: A supernova signal: vast roaring cosmic energy, a deep resonant boom evolving into shimmering bright overtones, a powerful sustained tense drone full of awe and danger, seamless loop
rarities.legendary: Mysterious alien voices: an indistinct whispering choir processed through radio static, otherworldly layered vocal pads and murmurs, haunting sense of first contact, seamless loop

noises._comment: Per-symbol interference that garbles the signal until the slot is decoded. 6 symbols -> signal-noise-1..6, ~10s seamless loops.

list.name: signal-noise-1
list.label: hiss
list.prompt: Harsh white-noise radio hiss, detuned shortwave radio static, constant airy interference, seamless loop

list.name: signal-noise-2
list.label: crackle
list.prompt: Irregular electrical crackle and pops, sparks and vinyl-like snaps, intermittent stuttering interference, seamless loop

list.name: signal-noise-3
list.label: rumble
list.prompt: Low-frequency subwoofer rumble drone, deep ominous interference hum, heavy and dark, seamless loop

list.name: signal-noise-4
list.label: beeps
list.prompt: Repeating mechanical interference beeps, glitchy digital error tones and data-burst chirps, seamless loop

list.name: signal-noise-5
list.label: warble
list.prompt: Wobbling warbling modulation, wow-and-flutter detuned tape interference, swirling pitch-bending whine, seamless loop

list.name: signal-noise-6
list.label: buzz
list.prompt: Harsh electrical buzz, distorted mains hum, angry insect-like buzzing interference, seamless loop

precursor._comment: Сигнали Предтеч (Precursor Signals) card-acquisition stingers — 4 selectable variants, ~2-3s one-shots, played at the moment the card flips face-up. Files: precursor/acquire-<1..4>. See PRECURSOR_SFX_PROMPTS.md at repo root for the same prompts in ready-to-paste form.

list.name: precursor/acquire-1
list.prompt: A single crystalline ping, a bright glassy bell-like chime with a long shimmering decay, clean and precise, a moment of discovery, one-shot

list.name: precursor/acquire-2
list.prompt: A low ancient hum slowly swelling into a warm resonant drone, deep and vast like an old machine waking up, dignified and mysterious, one-shot

list.name: precursor/acquire-3
list.prompt: A short radio burst decoding into a clean confirmation tone, digital data-static resolving into a clear bright pulse, a signal being successfully decrypted, one-shot

list.name: precursor/acquire-4
list.prompt: A harmonic choir pulse, layered ethereal vocal-like pad tones swelling together in a single consonant chord, otherworldly and reverent, one-shot

list.name: intro-genesis-loop
list.prompt: Deep low cosmic drone slowly breathing, vast empty space about to give birth to a star, sub-bass swell with no melody and no rhythm, meditative and immense, seamless loop

list.name: intro-bigbang
list.prompt: A sub-bass impact then a wide whoosh blossoming into a bright ringing tail, an elegant cosmic big bang, powerful but not scary, one-shot

list.name: intro-star-chime
list.prompt: A soft crystalline chime, a two or three note magical arpeggio, a single point of light being born, gentle and bright, one-shot

list.name: intro-theme
list.prompt: Atmospheric minimalist ambient pad, calm and hopeful space-journey mood, slow evolving synth texture, no drums and no strong melody, soothing background, seamless loop

list.name: directive-stamp
list.prompt: A short low official stamp thud with a brief metallic resonance, the sense of an order being issued and approved, one-shot

list.name: mission-start
list.prompt: A heroic short riser building into a bright uplifting chord, engines igniting, an emotional lift and reward, one-shot
